summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. PR #82906 is quarantined to central security handling because the validator classified it as security-sensitive. The remaining four PRs are kept as independent maintainer-ready candidates; no merge or fix action is recommended because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight with current mergeability plus Codex /review proof, and #83048 also has a failing check without a complete executable fix artifact.
